evals.description: Skill activates when user asks about connecting two SaaS tools
evals.prompt: I want to automatically create a HubSpot contact whenever someone fills out my Typeform. What's the best way?

evals.description: Skill activates when user asks about workflow automation platforms
evals.prompt: Should I use Zapier or Make for my automation? I need to route leads to different Slack channels based on their country.
How do I set up an n8n workflow that triggers on a webhook and transforms the data before sending it to a database?

evals.description: Agent can recommend correct platform for a simple linear automation
evals.prompt: I need a simple automation: when a new row is added to Google Sheets, send a Slack message. Which tool should I use?

evals.description: Agent can recommend Make for complex branching scenarios
evals.prompt: I need to process incoming orders, split them by region, apply different tax calculations, and send to different fulfillment services. Which no-code tool handles this best?

evals.description: Agent correctly describes n8n webhook setup with expressions
evals.prompt: Show me how to set up an n8n webhook trigger that routes data based on a JSON field

evals.description: Agent provides correct error handling guidance for automations
evals.prompt: My Zapier Zap keeps failing silently. How do I add error handling and monitoring?

evals.description: Agent handles webhook reliability edge cases correctly
evals.prompt: How do I handle duplicate webhook deliveries in my Make automation?

evals.description: Agent warns about rate limits in automation context
evals.prompt: I want to use Zapier to process 10,000 rows from a spreadsheet and create contacts in HubSpot for each one

evals.description: Agent recommends self-hosted n8n when data privacy is a concern
evals.prompt: We handle sensitive patient data and need workflow automation but can't send data to third-party cloud services. What should we use?

evals.description: Agent does not hallucinate a Zapier code step supporting Python
evals.prompt: Can I write a Python code step in Zapier to transform my data?

evals.description: Agent does not invent a non-existent Make feature
evals.prompt: Does Make have a built-in AI module that can automatically generate scenarios from natural language descriptions?

assertions.value: Make has a built-in AI scenario generator

evals.description: Agent correctly references platform-specific reference file
evals.prompt: I need detailed guidance on using Make routers, iterators, and aggregators for a complex data pipeline

evals.description: Agent provides internal tooling automation pattern
evals.prompt: I want to build an approval workflow where my team submits requests via a form, a manager approves in Slack, and the result updates a spreadsheet
